plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AyudaLock to scan voucher QR codes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow AyudaLock to attach your location to an incident report so responders know where to go.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AyudaLock to attach your location to an incident report so responders know where to go.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow AyudaLock to attach a photo to your incident report.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AyudaLock to take a photo for your incident report.
